runTitle: Vercel Production QA - deferred parity metadata preserved but detail contract still incomplete
coveredSurfaces: production deploy readiness for deferred parity metadata fix

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before production parity-detail recheck; effective total 17.2913 USD and billed cost 0.0000.

artifacts.label: Production AI detail view after deferred parity metadata preserve fix

completedImprovements.title: 스트리밍 AI 응답의 데이터 소스 라벨을 실시간 데이터 분석으로 승격
completedImprovements.evidence: Fresh production AI query for cache-redis-dc1-01 now renders '서버 실시간 데이터 분석' instead of the previous generic '일반 대화 응답' label after commit f2358d86e.

pendingImprovements.title: 프론트엔드 표시 상태와 AI 분석 상태 동일 슬롯 참조 검증
pendingImprovements.note: After commit f2358d86e and deployment dpl_FZkq9Qap3vNgz2SEo1VocAvitB9V reached READY, a fresh streaming AI answer now promotes the analysis basis label to '서버 실시간 데이터 분석', but '분석 근거 상세 보기' still shows only data/engine/period rows without the slot/dataSource parity contract block.

notes: Verified the latest Vercel production deployment dpl_FZkq9Qap3vNgz2SEo1VocAvitB9V for commit f2358d86e reached READY and was promoted to openmanager-ai.vercel.app.
Verified /dashboard rendered 'Synthetic OTel snapshot · 14:40 KST (slot 88/143)' during the production run.
Verified a fresh AI sidebar query 'cache-redis-dc1-01 메모리 사용률 몇 %야?' returned a successful streaming answer on production.
Verified the assistant response metadata badge now renders 'Streaming AI · 서버 실시간 데이터 분석'.
Observed that '분석 근거 상세 보기' still renders only data/engine/period rows and does not expose the slot/dataSource parity contract block, so the frontend-ai-data-parity-gate remains open.
